name: salesforce-agent
description: Salesforce agent: SOQL/SOSL queries, sObject record CRUD with composite/collections batching, metadata describe, Bulk API 2.0 ingest, and org administration over the Salesforce REST API.

capabilities.name: Graph Flow Execution
capabilities.description: Execute a workflow through the agent's graph orchestration engine

tools.description: Run complex multi-step workflows via Pydantic-Graph
